## Capabilities

| Capability | Status | Verified at | Issue | Cites | Notes |

| Dependency attribution | 🟢 `partial` | `2026-05-31` | [link](https://github.com/cajasmota/archigraph/issues/3512) | `internal/engine/cdk_edges.go` | CDK-TS + CDK-Python dependency edges implemented: DEPENDS_ON from grant calls (bucket.grantRead(fn) / data.grant_read(fn)), Lambda event sources (addEventSource / add_event_source), and construct vars passed through props/kwargs; mirrors the hcl extractor's depends_on->DEPENDS_ON edge kind. CDK-Java/Go/C# pending. Python branch: applyCDKEdgesPython. |
| Iac cross stack reference | — `not_applicable` | — | — | — | The CDK extractor emits no cross-stack / Fn.importValue / exportValue idiom; cross-construct edges are intra-app dependency edges, not cross-stack references. Honest-missing. |
| Iac environment region account | — `not_applicable` | — | — | — | CDK expresses deployment target via the Stack `env: { region, account }` prop and Lambda `runtime:`; cdk_edges.go extracts construct entities and dependency edges but does not parse the env prop or runtime and stamps no region/account/provider/runtime environment-targeting property. Honest-missing. |
| Iac event source wiring | ✅ `full` | `2026-06-04` | [link](https://github.com/cajasmota/archigraph/issues/4198) | `internal/engine/cdk_edges.go` | CDK Lambda event sources are attributed as DEPENDS_ON edges fn→event-source carrying reason=event_source. TS Pass 4 (cdkAddEventSourceRe, cdk_edges.go:137-142) matches `<fnVar>.addEventSource(new <SourceType>(<resourceVar>)` and calls emitDependsOn(fn,res,"event_source","") (cdk_edges.go:381-388); the emitDependsOn closure writes props["reason"]="event_source" (cdk_edges.go:310-313). Python Pass 4 mirrors it via cdkPyAddEventSourceRe for `<fn>.add_event_source(SqsEventSource(<res>))` (cdk_edges.go:203-204,472-479). Full for the addEventSource/add_event_source idiom across CDK-TS + CDK-Python (the languages CDK edges support); each edge records which event source triggers which function. |
| Iac iam grant attribution | ✅ `full` | `2026-06-04` | [link](https://github.com/cajasmota/archigraph/issues/4197) | `internal/engine/cdk_edges.go` | CDK grant calls are attributed as DEPENDS_ON edges grantee→granted-resource carrying reason=grant and a grant=<method> property naming the exact grant call. TS Pass 3 (cdkGrantRe, cdk_edges.go:128-134) matches `<res>.grant*(<grantee>)` (grantRead/grantWrite/grantReadWrite/grant…) and calls emitDependsOn(grantee,res,"grant",grantMethod) (cdk_edges.go:367-377); the emitDependsOn closure writes props["reason"]="grant" and props["grant"]=grantMethod (cdk_edges.go:310-317). Python Pass 3 mirrors it via cdkPyGrantRe for snake_case `<res>.grant_read(<grantee>)` (cdk_edges.go:193-198,460-468). Full for the grant idiom across CDK-TS + CDK-Python (the languages CDK edges support); each edge records which grantee was granted which method on which target. |
| Iac output export extraction | 🟢 `partial` | `2026-06-04` | [link](https://github.com/cajasmota/archigraph/issues/3512) | `internal/engine/rules/javascript_typescript/frameworks/aws_cdk.yaml`<br>`internal/engine/rules/python/frameworks/aws_cdk.yaml` | CfnOutput is extracted as a SCOPE.Config entity named by its OutputId literal via the entity rule `(?:new\s+)?(?:cdk\.)?CfnOutput\s*\(\s*\w+\s*,\s*["']([^"']+)["']` (aws_cdk.yaml:54-58 TS, :51-52 Py, name_group=1). Partial: covers CDK-TS + CDK-Python only; CDK-Java/Go/C# CfnOutput pending (same gap as resource_extraction). |
| Iac resource property extraction | 🟢 `partial` | — | 4194 | `internal/engine/cdk_edges.go`<br>`internal/engine/cdk_properties_test.go`<br>`internal/engine/iac_code_properties.go` | epic #4194: CDK now stamps a CURATED, bounded allow-list of literal SCALAR config props onto each construct's SCOPE.InfraResource, alongside (not replacing) the existing props_ref DEPENDS_ON edge mining. Pass 5 (cdkConstructPropsRe TS / cdkPyConstructPropsRe Python) feeds the props/kwargs body to the shared stampScalarProps closure (cdk_edges.go), which calls iacCodeExtractScalarProperties (iac_code_properties.go) and merges curated key=value onto the entity by LogicalId. Curated keys (case/underscore-folded, both camelCase + snake_case): instanceType/machineType/size/sku/tier/instanceClass/nodeType/vmSize, memorySize/memory/timeout, runtime/engine/engineVersion/version, count/desiredCapacity/desiredCount/minSize/maxSize/minCapacity/maxCapacity/replicas, port/protocol, allocatedStorage/storageType. ONLY literal scalars are stamped (quoted strings, numbers, true/false); enum/construct/Output refs (lambda.Runtime.NODEJS_20_X), call exprs (Duration.seconds(30)) and object/array values are SKIPPED (they stay reference edges). Value-asserting tests pin exact key=value: TestCDK_ScalarProps_TS (memorySize=512 stamped; timeout=Duration.seconds(30) + runtime=lambda.Runtime.X NOT stamped; non-curated description NOT stamped), TestCDK_ScalarProps_TS_StringAndBool (engine=postgres, engineVersion=15.3, allocatedStorage=100, port=5432), TestCDK_ScalarProps_Python (memory_size=512, engine=aurora; runtime=enum-ref NOT stamped), TestCDK_ScalarProps_NoRegressionPropsRefEdge (memorySize=256 stamped AND props_ref Handler→DataBucket edge still fires). PARTIAL: single-file regex over CDK-TS+CDK-Python; CDK-Java/Go/C# property stamping deferred; enum/Duration-wrapped values intentionally not unwrapped (correctness over coverage). DEPLOY-DEFERRED. |
| Iac stack app topology | ✅ `full` | `2026-06-04` | [link](https://github.com/cajasmota/archigraph/issues/4200) | `internal/engine/rules/javascript_typescript/frameworks/aws_cdk.yaml`<br>`internal/engine/rules/python/frameworks/aws_cdk.yaml` | The CDK stack/app composition hierarchy is extracted by the aws_cdk.yaml rules. Topology ENTITIES: `class <N> extends (cdk.)?Stack` and `(cdk.)?(Construct|Stage|NestedStack)` become Component entities (aws_cdk.yaml javascript_typescript:39-48 / python:36-45, name_group=1, scope=class), and `new (cdk.)?App()` becomes a Config entity (:49-53 / :46-50). CONTAINMENT relationship: the `new <N>Stack(<app>,'Id')` idiom emits an app→stack CALLS edge (relationship_rules, javascript_typescript:61-67 / python:57-64, source_group=2 app, target_group=1 stack) — the App-contains-Stack composition. Full across CDK-TS + CDK-Python (the languages the CDK rules cover). |
| Resource extraction | 🟢 `partial` | `2026-05-31` | [link](https://github.com/cajasmota/archigraph/issues/3512) | `internal/engine/cdk_edges.go`<br>`internal/engine/rules/javascript_typescript/frameworks/aws_cdk.yaml` | CDK-TS + CDK-Python implemented (applyCDKEdges / applyCDKEdgesPython): SCOPE.InfraResource per construct named by its 'LogicalId' literal (construct_type + coarse resource_scope). Stack/App scope via rules/{javascript_typescript,python}/frameworks/aws_cdk.yaml. CDK-Java/Go/C# pending. |
